name: freyr/kafka-php-workshop
description: PHP + Kafka workshop — runnable examples and exercises for a 2-day curriculum. Built on Confluent Platform, php-rdkafka and enqueue/rdkafka.

scripts-descriptions.demo:rebalance:consumer: Join the shared 'rebalance-demo' group on enet.ecommerce.orders and tail forever with verbose ⇄ assign/revoke output. Run in several terminals to watch cooperative-sticky rebalancing as members join/leave.
scripts-descriptions.demo:rebalance:producer: Stream order.created events to enet.ecommerce.orders so the rebalance-demo consumers have data flowing across all 6 partitions.
scripts-descriptions.demo:offsets:producer: Stream order.audited events to the single-partition enet.ecommerce.audit topic so both offsets-demo consumer groups have a backlog to read.
scripts-descriptions.demo:offsets:consumer-a: Consumer group 'offsets-demo-a' on enet.ecommerce.audit with Kafka-default auto-commit. Run alongside consumer-b and watch each group's committed offset advance independently in kafka-ui.
scripts-descriptions.demo:offsets:consumer-b: Second, independent consumer group 'offsets-demo-b' on the same single-partition topic — proves consumer groups track their own offsets separately from group A.
